description: Lock the 2026-06-27 chain_mail_armor correction to classical interlinked metal-ring mail armor, not leather armor, scale armor, or later medieval workshop production.

checks.reason: The node now anchors to the post-300 BC Celtic/Roman mail chronology rather than the old Classical era placeholder.
Mail is scoped as interlinked iron-ring armor, so iron working remains the main material capability.
The wearable armor system used quilted textile underlayers for comfort and cushioning, but this is support rather than the ring-material technology.
Leather working is broader than the corrected mail-armor mechanism and should not be restored without a leather-specific scope.
Medieval mail-smithing workshop production is represented by chainmail_armor_smithing, not this classical armor-existence node.
